tetris-0.0.1.description:
First release.

See game info and setup pages:

- https://github.com/Alchav/Archipelago/blob/tetris-gb/worlds/tetris_gb/docs/en_Tetris.md
- https://github.com/Alchav/Archipelago/blob/tetris-gb/worlds/tetris_gb/docs/setup_en.md

Note in particular that no patch file is created, you will connect a vanilla Tetris ROM to Bizhawk Client.
tetris-0.0.1.title: Tetris (Gameboy) v0.0.1
